title: Throws exception if a SQL/GIS takes argument null
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE geom_test(id INT PRIMARY KEY, g GEOMETRY, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO geom_test VALUES(1, ST_GeomFromText('POINT(4 5)'), 'Point geometry');
INSERT INTO geom_test VALUES(2, ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON((0 0, 10 0, 10 10, 0 10, 0 0))'), 'Polygon geometry');
INSERT INTO geom_test VALUES(3, NULL, 'Null geometry');
SELECT id, ST_AsText(g) FROM geom_test WHERE g IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: SQL/GIS function fails with null argument
